message:
test(mux): add 12 unit tests for renderable types (StableCursorPosition, RenderableDimensions)

Add test module to renderable.rs which previously had zero tests:
- StableCursorPosition: default, equality, inequality, clone/copy, debug, hash (6 tests)
- RenderableDimensions: default, equality, inequality, clone/copy, debug, reverse_video (6 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
